title: Webchanges Configuration File
description: JSON Schema for the webchanges config.yaml configuration file.

display.description: Selects which categories of jobs are included in reports (changes are always reported).

report.description: Settings for report formats (text, html, markdown) and reporters (stdout, email, telegram, etc.).

job_defaults.description: Default directives applied to jobs by kind (all, url, browser, command).

differ_defaults.description: Default directives applied to individual differs.

database.description: Snapshot database engine and retention settings.

footnote.description: Optional text appended to the footer of every report (text, html and markdown). Set to null to disable.

_ConfigDisplay.title: Display
_ConfigDisplay.description: Which job outcomes appear in reports. Changes are always reported.

new.description: Report newly-added jobs (jobs that have never produced a snapshot before).

error.description: Report jobs that failed with an error.

unchanged.description: Report jobs that ran successfully but produced no change.

empty-diff.description: Deprecated. Whether to report a 'changed' job whose diff was reduced to an empty string by a diff_filter. Use the additions_only job directive instead.

_ConfigReportText.title: Text report format
_ConfigReportText.description: Settings for the plain-text report (used by stdout, ifttt, mailgun, ntfy, prowl, pushbullet, pushover, run_command, webhook (default), xmpp).

line_length.description: Maximum length of each line in characters. Ignored if 'minimal' is true.

details.description: Include the diff of each job. Ignored if 'minimal' is true.

footer.description: Show a footer listing the number of jobs and elapsed time. Ignored if 'minimal' is true.

minimal.description: Send an abbreviated report (suppresses details, footer, and line_length).

separate.description: Send a separate report for each job instead of a single combined report.

_ConfigReportHtml.title: HTML report format
_ConfigReportHtml.description: Settings for the HTML report (used by browser, email with html: true).

diff.description: Deprecated; specify a differ in the job instead.

footer.description: Show a footer listing the number of jobs and elapsed time.

separate.description: Send a separate report for each job instead of a single combined report.

title.description: The HTML document title. Use {count} for the number of reports, {jobs} for the title of jobs reported, and {jobs_files} for a space followed by the name(s) of the jobs file(s) (in parentheses, with a leading 'jobs-' stripped) when not using the default jobs.yaml.

_ConfigReportMarkdown.title: Markdown report format
_ConfigReportMarkdown.description: Settings for the Markdown report (used by gotify, matrix, telegram, webhook with markdown: true).

details.description: Include the diff of each job. Ignored if 'minimal' is true.

footer.description: Show a footer listing the number of jobs and elapsed time. Ignored if 'minimal' is true.

minimal.description: Send an abbreviated report (suppresses details and footer).

separate.description: Send a separate report for each job instead of a single combined report.

_ConfigReportStdout.title: stdout reporter
_ConfigReportStdout.description: Display a text report on standard output (the console).

color.description: Use color for additions (green) and deletions (red). true is equivalent to 'bright'; false disables color.

_ConfigReportBrowser.title: Browser reporter
_ConfigReportBrowser.description: Open the HTML report in the system's default web browser.

_ConfigReportDiscord.title: Discord reporter
_ConfigReportDiscord.description: Send the report as a message in a Discord channel via a webhook.

webhook_url.description: The Discord webhook URL (created via Discord server Settings → Integrations → New Webhook).

embed.description: If true, the report is sent as a Discord Embed object; the 'subject' becomes the message text and the report is shown as embedded text.

subject.description: Only used when 'embed' is true; the message that precedes the embedded report. Use {count}, {jobs}, and {jobs_files} placeholders (see html.title for details).

colored.description: If true, embed the report as 'diff' code so Discord applies syntax highlighting (color) to additions and deletions.

max_message_length.description: Maximum length of a message in characters. Defaults to Discord's limit: 2,000, or 4,096 when 'embed' is true.

_ConfigReportEmailSmtp.title: SMTP settings
_ConfigReportEmailSmtp.description: SMTP server settings used when email.method is 'smtp'.

user.description: Username used to authenticate against the SMTP server.

port.description: Port used to communicate with the SMTP server. Common values: 25 (plaintext), 465 (implicit TLS), 587 (STARTTLS).

starttls.description: Whether the server uses STARTTLS encryption.

auth.description: Whether the SMTP server requires username/password authentication.

insecure_password.description: Password used to authenticate when not using a keyring. Storing the password in plaintext is insecure; only use a throwaway account dedicated to webchanges.

utf_8.description: Use RFC 6531 Internationalized Email (SMTPUTF8 service extension).

_ConfigReportEmailSendmail.title: sendmail settings
_ConfigReportEmailSendmail.description: External sendmail program settings used when email.method is 'sendmail' (Linux only).

path.description: Path to (or name of) the external sendmail executable.

_ConfigReportEmail.title: Email reporter
_ConfigReportEmail.description: Send the report via email, using either SMTP or the external sendmail program.

html.description: If true, the email body includes the HTML report (in addition to the text part).

to.description: Destination email address(es). For multiple recipients, concatenate with commas.

from.description: Sender's email address. Do not use a primary mailbox; create a throwaway account for webchanges.

subject.description: Subject line. Use {count}, {jobs}, and {jobs_files} placeholders (see html.title for details).

_ConfigReportGithubIssue.title: GitHub Issue reporter
_ConfigReportGithubIssue.description: Submit the Markdown report as a new issue on a GitHub repository. Requires a personal access token with 'public_repo' (public) or 'repo' (private) scope.

owner.description: Owner (user or organization) of the target GitHub repository.

repo.description: Name of the target GitHub repository.

title.description: Title of the issue. Use {dt} for the date and time.

labels.description: Labels to add to the issue.

format_dt.description: strftime format for the {dt} placeholder in 'title'.

format_content.description: Template for the issue body. Use {content} for the report content.

assignees.description: GitHub usernames to assign to the issue.

type.description: Type of issue to create (GitHub Enterprise feature).

milestone.description: Number of the milestone to associate with the issue.

_ConfigReportGotify.title: Gotify reporter
_ConfigReportGotify.description: Send the Markdown report to a Gotify server. Requires an application token created on the Gotify server's Web-UI.

server_url.description: Base URL of the Gotify server.

_ConfigReportIfttt.title: IFTTT reporter
_ConfigReportIfttt.description: Send the text report as an IFTTT event via the Maker Webhooks service.

_ConfigReportMailgun.title: Mailgun reporter
_ConfigReportMailgun.description: Send the text report via email using the Mailgun service.

subject.description: Subject line. Use {count}, {jobs}, and {jobs_files} placeholders (see html.title for details).

_ConfigReportMatrix.title: Matrix reporter
_ConfigReportMatrix.description: Send the report to a room using the Matrix protocol.

_ConfigReportNtfyPriorities.title: ntfy priorities
_ConfigReportNtfyPriorities.description: Per-event-kind ntfy message priorities. Each value is either an integer 1-5 or a name ('min', 'low', 'default', 'high', 'max').

default.description: Priority used when no event-specific priority applies. Integer 1-5 or one of: min, low, default, high, max.

new.description: Priority for newly-added jobs. Integer 1-5 or one of: min, low, default, high, max.

changed.description: Priority for changed jobs. Integer 1-5 or one of: min, low, default, high, max.

error.description: Priority for jobs that errored. Integer 1-5 or one of: min, low, default, high, max.

_ConfigReportNtfy.title: ntfy reporter
_ConfigReportNtfy.description: Send the text report to an ntfy server (https://ntfy.sh).

topic_url.description: Topic URL to publish to (e.g. https://ntfy.sh/your-topic).

authorization.description: Optional value for the Authorization header (see https://docs.ntfy.sh/publish/#authentication). null disables authentication.

_ConfigReportProwl.title: Prowl reporter
_ConfigReportProwl.description: Send the text report via Prowl (iOS push notifications).

application.description: Application name shown as the source of the event in the Prowl app.

subject.description: Subject line; used as the Prowl event name. Use {count}, {jobs}, and {jobs_files} placeholders (see html.title for details).

_ConfigReportPushbullet.title: Pushbullet reporter
_ConfigReportPushbullet.description: Send the text report via Pushbullet. Note: the underlying 'pushbullet' Python package has not been maintained since 2022.

_ConfigReportPushover.title: Pushover reporter
_ConfigReportPushover.description: Send the text report via Pushover (https://pushover.net).

device.description: Target device name (as listed in the Pushover console). Leave null/omit to send to all of your devices.

priority.description: Pushover message priority. Any value other than the listed five is mapped to 'normal'.

_ConfigReportRunCommand.title: run_command reporter
_ConfigReportRunCommand.description: Run a local command receiving the text report. Substitutes {count}, {jobs}, and {text} in the command string and exposes the WEBCHANGES_REPORT_CONFIG_JSON and WEBCHANGES_CHANGED_JOBS_JSON environment variables.

_ConfigReportTelegram.title: Telegram reporter
_ConfigReportTelegram.description: Send the Markdown report via Telegram using the Bot API.

bot_token.description: Bot authentication token from BotFather. If null/blank, the TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN environment variable is used instead.

chat_id.description: Target chat ID(s). Positive numeric IDs are private groups; negative numeric IDs are public groups; '@channelusername' targets a channel. May be a single value or a list.

silent.description: If true, deliver the notification without sound.

_ConfigReportWebhook.title: Webhook reporter
_ConfigReportWebhook.description: Send the report to a webhook endpoint (e.g. Slack, Mattermost).

markdown.description: If true, send the Markdown report instead of plain text.

rich_text.description: If true, send preformatted rich text (Slack-specific).

max_message_length.description: Maximum length of a message in characters. Default is 40,000.

_ConfigReportXmpp.title: XMPP reporter
_ConfigReportXmpp.description: Send the text report via the XMPP protocol. Use a dedicated XMPP account, never a primary one.

insecure_password.description: Sender password stored in plaintext. Insecure; only use a throwaway account. Ignored if a keyring entry is configured via 'webchanges --xmpp-login'.

_ConfigReport.title: Report and reporter settings
_ConfigReport.description: Container for report-format settings (text, html, markdown) and reporter settings.

tz.description: IANA time zone name (e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles', 'Etc/UTC') used in reports. null/blank uses the system time zone. Ignored by external differs called via the command differ.

_ConfigJobDefaults.title: Job defaults
_ConfigJobDefaults.description: Default directives applied to jobs by kind. All keys are optional; any directive set under 'url', 'browser', or 'command' overrides the same directive set under 'all' (the 'headers' directive merges header-by-header).

_note.description: Free-form note (ignored by webchanges; keys starting with '_' are not interpreted).

all.description: Directives applied to every job, including those defined in hooks.py.

browser.description: Directives applied to 'url' jobs with 'use_browser: true'.

_ConfigDifferDefaults.title: Differ defaults
_ConfigDifferDefaults.description: Default directives applied to individual differs. All keys are optional.

_note.description: Free-form note (ignored by webchanges; keys starting with '_' are not interpreted).

ai_google.description: Default directives for the 'ai_google' differ (e.g. 'model: gemini-2.0-flash').

engine.description: Snapshot database engine. Use 'sqlite3' (default; indexed and msgpack-compressed), 'textfiles' (one text file per job; loses ETag and MIME type), 'minidb' (deprecated legacy backend), or a 'redis://' / 'rediss://' URI to use a Redis backend. Can be overridden with the --cache-engine command-line argument.

max_snapshots.description: Maximum number of snapshots to retain (sqlite3 engine only). 0 means retain all snapshots indefinitely. Other engines retain either all snapshots (redis, minidb) or only the latest one (textfiles). Can be overridden with the --max-snapshots command-line argument.
